pundit.name: Alexi Lalas
pundit.take:
**Mustard Boy, Ghost Pepper: You two are the soccer equivalent of a grilled cheese sandwich and a ghost pepper challenge, but let's talk about this Czechia vs. South Africa showdown!** Look, Czechia is running on the fumes of their generally tight European style, taking on an unpredictable South Africa who's as hot-and-cold as a bad air conditioning unit. Zach, "Mustard Boy," you think drafting Czechia was a safe pick, when in reality, it screams, "I’m terrified of risk!" Devin, aka "Ghost Pepper," your South Africa choice is as volatile as a fireworks warehouse. Mark my words, Czechia is going to grind this one out, and the only ghost here will be your chances of moving up in this table.

And for the grand theater of Switzerland vs. Bosnia, Devin, look at me. LOOK AT ME. You drafted Bosnia thinking they were a secret weapon; let me tell you something — Bosnia is no World Cup warrior. Zach's Switzerland is going to showcase the precision and discipline you only wish you had when picking teams. Just like a Swiss watch, they'll be ticking along to a victory while Bosnia remains a fantasy footnote. If you think different, Devin, then you're more delusional than I was making that beard a signature.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper Devin set to melt against Mustard Boy Zach
pundit_takes.subtitle: Czechia and Switzerland expected to reduce Bosnia and South Africa to ashes.

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G's Canada predicted to make the most of Qatar's absence
pundit_takes.subtitle: Canada hopes home advantage will boost Gunner's last-place standings.

pundit_takes.headline: The Backpass Assassin Gayden will try not to fumble against Mexico
pundit_takes.subtitle: Korea Republic looks to lift Gayden's lead at the top, if he stays present.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy Zach relying on more than condiments to catch son Rafe
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach's dual fixtures could shake up standings with strategic seasoning.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner, the model's favorite, is slipping faster than a greased-up slip-n-slide.
Rafe's draft picks were a joke, but he's still laughing at the leaderboard.
Rafe owns Devin like a landlord collecting rent; 6-0 head-to-head. Brutal.
Rafe's chaos crashed the sim—teenagers 1, spreadsheets 0.
